title: Financial Year Master
subtitle: Manage and configure financial year periods and status

messages.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this financial year?
messages.confirmClose: Are you sure you want to close this financial year? This action cannot be undone.

form.description: Configure financial year period and settings

validation.codeMaxLength: Year code must be at most {count} characters
validation.endDateMustBeAfterStartDate: End date must be after start date
validation.startDateRange: Start date must be within the financial year (April 1st to March 31st)
validation.endDateRange: End date must be within the financial year (April 1st to March 31st)
validation.descriptionMaxLength: Description must be at most {count} characters
validation.yearMustBePositive: Year must be a positive number
validation.codeAllZeros: Year code cannot be all zeros
validation.statusInvalid: Status must be Draft, Active, or Closed
validation.backendError: An error occurred. Please try again.

confirmStatusUpdate.title: Confirm Status Update
confirmStatusUpdate.description: Are you sure you want to change the status to {status}?
